---
title: "start playing with stan"
author: "Haoyu Ji"
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
bibliography: ../pruning.bib
date: today
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
setwd(here::here())
```

```{r pkgs, include=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("R/pruning_funs.R")
source("R/postAD.R")
library(tmbstan)
```

```{r obj}
set.seed(427)
m3 <- rtree(20)
g1 <- reorder(m3, "pruningwise")
log_trans_rates <- log(abs(rnorm(8)))
objfun <- postAD(g1, 2, 2, log_trans_rates, multistart = 10, seed = 427, return_obj = TRUE)
objfun$fn(objfun$par)
```

```{r}
options(mc.cores = 1)
stanfit1 <- tmbstan(objfun, chains = 1, iter = 1000, seed = 20260302,
                    init = "par",silent = FALSE
                    )
```

```{r chain1}
library(bayestestR)
diagnostic_posterior(stanfit1)
## trace plots, ...
library(bayesplot)
mcmc_trace(stanfit1)
mcmc_rank_overlay(stanfit1)
```

```{r chain2}
options(mc.cores = 1)
stanfit2 <- tmbstan(objfun, chains = 2, iter = 2000, seed = 427,
                    init = "par",silent = FALSE
                    )
```

```{r chain22, eval = FALSE}
options(mc.cores = 2)
stanfit22 <- tmbstan(objfun, chains = 2, iter = 2000, seed = 427,
                    init = "par",silent = FALSE
                    )
```
